meaning: adv.公认地,诚然,无可否认的
examples: Admittedly, those mighty forces are spiritual ones.
Admittedly there has been a contraction of village commerce, but its vigour is still remarkable.
Admittedly, turning to others for help and suggestion by no means refers to absolute and irresponsible dependence.
But when I asked him about the short term, it was admittedly a harder sell.
Not on the scale seen in 2006, admittedly, but enough to take advantage of rising markets.
